message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Weekly Rewards to Vaults

actor "User" as User
actor "Ops" as Ops
participant "<<mStable>>\nEmissions Controller" as EmissionsController
participant "<<mStable>>\nVaults" as Vaults
participant "<<mStable>>\nMTA" as MTA

User -> EmissionsController: setVoterDialWeights ([dial ids], [weights])
activate EmissionsController
note right of EmissionsController: proportions voting power across dials\nfor future distributions
deactivate EmissionsController
EmissionsController --> User

== After Thursday 00:00 UTC ==

Ops -> EmissionsController: calculateRewards ()
activate EmissionsController
note right of EmissionsController: Calculates and stores\nrewards for each dial
deactivate EmissionsController
EmissionsController --> Ops

Ops -> EmissionsController: distributeRewards ([dial ids])
activate EmissionsController
loop [Dials]
    note left: transfer MTA\nfrom Emissions Controller\nto Vault
    EmissionsController -> MTA: transfer(vault, rewards)
    activate MTA
    deactivate MTA
    MTA --> EmissionsController
    
    EmissionsController -> Vaults: notifyRewardAmount(rewards)
    activate Vaults
    note right of Vaults: Stream MTA to Users
    deactivate Vaults
    Vaults --> EmissionsController
end loop
deactivate EmissionsController
EmissionsController --> Ops

== After rewards have accrued ==

User -> Vaults: claimRewards ()
activate Vaults
note left: transfer MTA\nfrom Vault\nto User
Vaults -> MTA: transfer(user, rewards)
activate MTA
deactivate MTA
MTA --> Vaults
deactivate Vaults
Vaults --> User

@enduml
```
